raw_text: {"verdict": "ESCALATE", "rationale": "The activation records and calibration packet both reference DG-41B production units at Site 18-P under release condition RC-7, and the review log confirms dependency attachment. However, reference note NOTE-ACR-022 explicitly states that lab devices and production devices share the DG-41B naming prefix, directly contradicting policy STD-ACR-022-P which warns that shared naming prefixes alone are insufficient to verify device group match. The narrow source-record defect is that the calibration packet does not affirmatively distinguish whether it covers the production subgroup or the lab subgroup within the DG-41B prefix.", "cited_artifacts": ["ACT-ACR-022", "CAL-ACR-022", "NOTE-ACR-022", "STD-ACR-022-P", "LOG-ACR-022"]}

parsed_json.rationale: The activation records and calibration packet both reference DG-41B production units at Site 18-P under release condition RC-7, and the review log confirms dependency attachment. However, reference note NOTE-ACR-022 explicitly states that lab devices and production devices share the DG-41B naming prefix, directly contradicting policy STD-ACR-022-P which warns that shared naming prefixes alone are insufficient to verify device group match. The narrow source-record defect is that the calibration packet does not affirmatively distinguish whether it covers the production subgroup or the lab subgroup within the DG-41B prefix.
